Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
RESPONDENT RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE SAN FRANCISCO EMPLOYEES' RETIREMENT SYSTEMS' MOTION To Tax Petitioner's Costs IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Notice Of Hearing Petition For Pereptory Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Feb-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. GEORGE J. ENGLER, TEL. NO. 202-1919 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. REBECCA LIU, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3870 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. PETITIONER ROLANDO VENGCO'S Petition For Peremptory Writ Of Mandamus IS GRANTED AND REMANDED BACK FOR FURTHER CONSISTENT PROCEEDING. MR. ENGLER TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Kent S. Gubbine, CSR # 5797 =301/PJB
